name: Several UI changes to control dropdown. - Move the Update Refine to the manageme

rounds.implementation_report: Committed ed0f6936 (Unify controls menu design). Moved Update Refine into Management ahead of Guide while preserving its live status; rebuilt Command Palette and Report a bug as the same left-aligned icon/label rows used by management links; reset button-only shadow, alignment, weight, and hover differences; and rebuilt the white Controls trigger as a split control matching New Goal with equal height and a dedicated divided arrow segment. Added regression assertions for the split structure, management placement, and command-row design. Exact verification: cargo test --lib -- --test-threads=1 passed 454/454; cargo test --lib static_main_nav_ -- --nocapture passed 2/2; node --test tests/web_*.test.js passed 35/35; cargo fmt --all -- --check passed; git diff --check passed. Playwright render checks at 1440px and 390px measured Controls and New Goal at exactly 34px high, a 1px divider, white Controls background, 30px desktop and 28px narrow arrow segments, matching 32.296875px Command Palette/Guide row heights and left edges, no Command Palette button shadow, and successful palette opening from the restyled row. Worktree is clean.
rounds.prompt:
Several UI changes to control dropdown.
- Move the Update Refine to the management section.
- Update the Command Palette button to match design of the items in the management section
- Make the Control button match the layout of the New Goal button dropdown, but keep the white color. It needs to be the same height, have the divider line between controls label and arrow.
- In general, I'm looking for a consistent menu design.

diagnostics: No Quality tests or migrated commands are configured; evaluation was a no-op.
